_comment: Settings you're most likely to need to change. Edit values on the right, not the keys on the left.
_comment_folder: Which Outlook folder to watch. 'Inbox' is the default top-level inbox.
_comment_processed: After a scan email is handled, it gets moved into this subfolder of the watched folder. This is how the script avoids re-processing the same email twice - it will be created automatically the first time you run the script if it doesn't exist.
_comment_download: Where PDFs get saved on your machine before they're renamed/filed. Relative to the project folder.
_comment_tesseract: Path to the Tesseract OCR executable. Update this if you install Tesseract somewhere other than the default Windows location.
_comment_crop: For speed, we only OCR the top and bottom portion of page 1 (property/doc-type clues almost always live in a letterhead or footer) instead of the whole document. These are fractions of the page height. Increase them if matching starts missing things lower/higher on the page.
_comment_fallback: If a PDF can't be confidently matched to a property and/or doc type, it goes here instead of being guessed wrong or blocked. Check this folder periodically and either file those manually or add a new alias/keyword so similar docs match automatically next time.
_comment_output: The root folder where PropertyName/DocType subfolders get created. Point this at wherever you currently drag files into before uploading to SharePoint.
_comment_background: How often (in minutes) the background tray app checks Outlook for new scans when running in always-on mode.
